questions.enonce: What is the best definition of 'culture'?
options: The shared beliefs, customs, and art of a group of people
The type of money used in a country
The number of people in a city

questions.enonce: Traditions never change and always stay the same for 1000 years.
A mix of many different cultures in one place is called multi-{{1}}.

questions.question: Match the cultural element to its category.

questions.enonce: Why is it important to learn about other cultures?
options: To understand, respect, and connect with people around the world
To know which country has the best toys
To learn how to draw maps
It is not important at all
